calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-29-2022 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-01-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jonathan Weinberg, via ZOOM, for Kenneth Foster, Administrator.

The court queries Mr. Weinberg regarding whether he has seen the court's tentative ruling specifically regarding the request for extraordinary fees for the preparation of an ex parte application. Counsel reports regarding his attempt to apply for preliminary distribution via an ex parte application as the Administrator had an urgent need for funds. The court points counsel to the local rule regarding his request which was ultimately rejected by the court. Counsel advises that he is withdrawing the request for extraordinary fees, in open court.

The Petition for Final Distribution, etc., is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: J. Jeung. Not reported.
